name: docs-ssh
description: Self-hosted SSH docs server serving 60+ documentation sources (docs + API specs) as searchable markdown over SSH

scripts.docker:build: DOCS_OUT_DIR=./docs DOCS_WORK_DIR=/tmp/docs-ssh-work DOCS_MAX_AGE=0 node --import tsx/esm src/index.ts && docker build --build-arg DOCS_PREBUILT=true -t docs-ssh:local .
scripts.docker:build:cached: DOCS_OUT_DIR=./docs DOCS_WORK_DIR=/tmp/docs-ssh-work node --import tsx/esm src/index.ts && docker build --build-arg DOCS_PREBUILT=true -t docs-ssh:local .
scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch -m 'release: v%s' && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor -m 'release: v%s' && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm version major -m 'release: v%s' && git push origin main --tags
